title: P1 — Repository initialization
objective: Solution scaffold, Docker stack (api/web/keycloak/sqlserver/seq/minio), CI skeleton.

title: P2 — Backend foundation
objective: Modular-monolith host + the Membership reference-module pattern.

title: P3 — Frontend foundation
objective: App shell, design tokens, i18n EN/AR + right-to-left, role-filtered navigation.

title: P4 — Identity & permissions
objective: Claim-to-role mapping, policy + attribute-based authorization, segregation of duties, Users & Membership UI.

title: P5 — Topics & backlog
objective: Intake, triage and backlog; multiple views; drag-and-drop prioritization.

title: P6 — Agenda & meetings
objective: Agenda building and meeting management, plus the in-app notification centre.

title: P7 — Minutes & decisions
objective: Minutes of meeting lifecycle and the decision record.

title: P8 — Actions & follow-up
objective: Action tracking including Hangfire reminders, the Job Monitor, and the decision-link gate.

title: P9 — Voting
objective: The voting engine, including the P1–P9 audit remediation and the hash-chained audit store.

title: P10 — Risks, dependencies & traceability
objective: Risk and dependency registers, the typed traceability graph, the impact graph, and risk/dependency reports.

title: P11 — ADRs & invariants
objective: The Governance module: ADR repository, invariant registry, and decision-to-ADR promotion.

title: P12 — Dashboards & reports
objective: Role dashboards and the reports surface.

title: P13 — Webex adapter
objective: Webex notifications and recording links, strictly behind the INotificationChannel seam (DW-002 / D-02). Includes manual recording upload with presigned playback.

title: P14 — Tarseem diagram sidecar
objective: A Tarseem diagram render sidecar behind the IDiagramRenderer seam, plus the Diagrams surface (DW-011 / D-11). DEFERRED INDEFINITELY and removed from the active ladder by operator decision DEC-028 of 2026-07-17. Not built; the seam does not exist and the product ships with no in-product diagram renderer. Re-opened only by explicit operator instruction, with no automatic trigger. This slice correctly has zero progress entries because it was never built.

title: P15 — Research & Knowledge
objective: The standalone Research module plus the Knowledge wiki and templates. The Keystone research-mission import (FR-112) was deferred out of this slice to future work on 2026-07-12 (DW-005 / D-05) and was not built.

title: P16 — Security hardening
objective: An OWASP ASVS 5.0 L2 sweep, including per-ballot crypto chaining (DW-013 / D-13), CI security gates, and container hardening. Cross-cutting in the roadmap; homed under PH-4 by DEC-029.

title: P17 — Testing hardening
objective: Harvest the testing deferrals accumulated in the progress log; partially advanced ahead of time by the S0–S7 coverage and end-to-end slices under ADR-0016. Cross-cutting in the roadmap; homed under PH-4 by DEC-029.

title: P18 — Deployment
objective: Production compose with overrides, migration-on-deploy, nightly backups and warm-standby restore, and the deployment and rollback runbook. Cross-cutting in the roadmap; homed under PH-4 by DEC-029.

title: P19 — Final audit & release readiness
objective: The release-gate checkpoints and the definition of done, plus the final acceptance-audit report. Returned a conditional no-go pending operator go-live actions rather than further build work. Cross-cutting in the roadmap; homed under PH-4 by DEC-029.
